g.text: Where the CEO talks to the bot. One platform per engagement.
The brain. Multi-tenant. If the client churns, the bot goes silent.
• Construct Claude API calls w/ tools
Direct API access — not Managed Agents. We keep control of prompts, routing, logic.
Tool use · per-client system prompt · multi-model
Client's Anthropic account. Client pays for tokens.
FreshStack recommends Claude for tool use.
We build on the raw API so FreshStack keeps
full control of prompts, routing, execution
logic, and client data. Our IP, not theirs.
MCP-first, REST-fallback. Each client platform is a modular add-on.

text.tspan: Email + Calendar typically pair (Google Workspace or Microsoft 365). V1 = 3 tools but usually 2 decisions — pick CRM + pick Google-or-Microsoft stack.

g.text: Where Layer 2 actually runs. Multi-tenant — one deployment serves all clients.
